# Chapter 5: Metals and alloys  (~110 pp)
- 5.1 Crystal structures of metals (12) · 5.2 Plastic deformation, dislocations (15) · 5.3 Strengthening mechanisms (15) · 5.4 Steels and cast irons (18) · 5.5 Aluminium alloys (12) · 5.6 Copper, titanium, magnesium, nickel-based superalloys (15) · 5.7 Welding and joining metals (15) · 5.8 Failure section: weld failures, hydrogen embrittlement, stress-corrosion cracking (8)

**Archetype**: scaling, failure. **Project**: identify a metal sample by hardness, density, and conductivity testing. **Exercises**: 35.
